center.name: 希爾卡尼亞森林
center.summary: 希爾卡尼亞森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Caspian tit，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in the deciduous mountain forests with its core population concentrated in the Hyrcanian forests of Iran, just extending into Azerbaijan

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in the deciduous mountain forests with its core population concentrated in the Hyrcanian forests of Iran, just extending into Azerbaijan
